title: henckelia cinerea
intro: Henckelia cinerea, also known as the Ashy Lip or Ashy Lip Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Henckelia cinerea include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as providing protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, Henckelia cinerea is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
